result.status_detail: Cycle 94 R-2 perplexity post-deploy probe + complete request body field capture. UI behavior IDENTICAL to #568 — toast '이 스레드는 존재하지 않습니다' rendered, URL routing /search/blocked-{uuid} fails to fetch (NEEDS_UUID_ECHO architectural issue persists). NEW DATA: full request payload captured via DevTools Network → perplexity_ask request → Payload tab.
result.endpoint_path_hint: Path contains 'sse' substring suggesting SSE-streaming response (EventStream tab visible in DevTools), even though Network listing shows 'h2 fetch'
result.key_observation: Top-level 'query_str' contains the prompt; 'params.dsl_query' duplicates it. The 'frontend_uuid' and 'frontend_context_uuid' fields ARE the client-side identifiers that the response envelope MUST echo (mapped to backend_uuid/context_uuid in #551 cycle 93 response capture).
result.envelope_design_implication: perplexity_sse template should set: response.backend_uuid = mirror(frontend_uuid, but Server-side must generate this), response.context_uuid = mirror(frontend_context_uuid), response.frontend_context_uuid = REQUEST_BODY:params.frontend_context_uuid, response.uuid = unique-per-event. The new REQUEST_BODY substitution token is the right tool for this.
result.verdict_diff_from_568: Same UI failure (no warning render). Engine deploy did not yet update perplexity_sse template. Field-name confirmation now COMPLETE — frontend_uuid/frontend_context_uuid are the echo targets.

notes: Cycle 94 R-2 perplexity probe COMPLETE for SQL update. Request body fields fully captured. Critical fields for UUID-echo template: params.frontend_uuid, params.frontend_context_uuid (sub-objects under params object). Endpoint: POST /rest/sse/perplexity_ask over h2. Recommend updating perplexity_sse render_envelope_template to use REQUEST_BODY:params.frontend_uuid and REQUEST_BODY:params.frontend_context_uuid substitution tokens to make response visible to client (resolves NEEDS_UUID_ECHO_INFRA blocker).
